title: Figure 7 from: Chen K-H, Liao T-Y (2024) A new species of the genus Luciogobius Gill, 1859 (Teleostei, Oxudercidae) from Taiwan. ZooKeys 1206: 241-254. https://doi.org/10.3897/zookeys.1206.118757
author: Chen, Kuan-Hsun
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 7 Maximum-likelihood (ML) tree based on 12S ribosomal RNA gene sequences (133 bp) using Tamura-3+G model with 1,000 bootstrap replications. Numbers of branches indicate bootstrap values higher than 60%.
steps_raw: Figure 7 Maximum-likelihood (ML) tree based on 12S ribosomal RNA gene sequences (133 bp) using Tamura-3+G model with 1,000 bootstrap replications. Numbers of branches indicate bootstrap values higher than 60%.
